description_long: This steak object is an elongated, irregularly shaped cut of meat with a rugged, wrinkled surface and a natural, organic appearance. The exterior displays a range of reddish-brown hues, with darker, almost charred areas and lighter, pinkish sections, suggesting a cooked surface. Prominent surface creases and folds run along its length, giving it a textured, fibrous look. There are no visible grill marks, bones, or garnishes present. The steak's surface appears slightly glossy in some areas, indicating a degree of moisture or fat. Overall, the object resembles a well-cooked, rustic steak with moderate fat marbling and a natural, unprocessed presentation.
description: A rugged, reddish-brown steak with wrinkled, fibrous texture and moderate fat marbling, lacking grill marks or garnish.
description_view_0: This view shows the steak's side profile with pronounced surface folds and a slightly pointed top, highlighting its irregular, natural shape.
description_view_1: The front view reveals a broad, wrinkled face with a central dark patch and visible marbling, emphasizing the steak's fibrous texture.
description_view_2: This side view displays a more rounded contour with visible creases and a lighter coloration along the edge, showing some surface irregularities.
description_view_3: The back view is darker and less detailed, with deep shadows and subtle surface folds, making the steak appear more solid and dense.
attribute_grill_marks: No grill marks are visible on the steak's surface.
attribute_visible_fat_marbling: Moderate fat marbling is visible, with some concentration along the central and lower areas.
